hooks.command: if [ "${OS:-}" = 'Windows_NT' ]; then powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/session-init.ps1"; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/session-init.sh"; fi
if [ "${OS:-}" = 'Windows_NT' ]; then powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/inject-context.ps1"; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/inject-context.sh"; fi
